steps.title: Welcome & Login
steps.narration: We start at the secure login. Demo credentials are preloaded for a frictionless walkthrough.

popups.content: Demo mode is active with pre-seeded data and guided highlights.

steps.title: Dashboard Overview
steps.narration: The provider dashboard surfaces real-time care gap activity, priority alerts, and next-best actions.

popups.content: These cards show total open gaps, high-priority items, and current performance.

steps.title: Hero Patient Workflow
steps.narration: We focus on Maria Garcia to show a real care gap workflow and prioritization logic.

popups.content: Care gaps are sorted by urgency so teams can act immediately.

steps.title: Taking Action
steps.narration: Interventions and outreach actions are captured in one place to close gaps faster.

popups.content: One-click actions log outreach, appointments, and follow-ups.

steps.title: Quality Impact
steps.narration: Quality outcomes update instantly as care gaps close, showing impact on HEDIS measures.

popups.content: Measure performance and trends are tracked in real time.

steps.title: Live Monitoring
steps.narration: Real-time monitoring confirms the platform is processing live data across services.

popups.content: Live telemetry shows evaluation flow and service performance.

steps.title: AI Solutioning
steps.narration: AI-driven guidance explains the next-best action and accelerates care coordination.

popups.content: AI highlights the highest impact moves for patient outcomes.
